万亿富二代苏沐穿越到狗血爽文《神渊大陆》中，成为炮灰反派，系统告诉他，只要完成所有剧情就能回家。
为此，苏沐不断磨练演技，扮演坏蛋。
没成想杀青之后居然天道崩溃要重来一遍？
“玩儿呢？！”苏沐崩溃。
没办法了，苏沐只能重新开启二代目。
可是……
原本高冷的女主变得温婉可人。
男主的美女师尊态度大变，投入了苏沐的怀抱。
紧接着迎来的是腹黑萝莉，清纯少女……
……
不是？等等！
你们不是女主角吗？
都围着我这恶毒男配算怎么回事？
苏沐崩溃大喊。
“我只想要回家！求求你们看剧本吧……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bdab67af6359f034b6a3703fa61bc5f","author":"我是一只熊大","author_id":"","book_id":"7472284692868254745","book_name":"扮演反派，你告诉我女主全重生？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7472576304336880153","read_count":"24597","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"705429"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"339","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,多女主,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ff8f27480682d2d1c52ba7845e426ba4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285232&x-signature=myPF9tuFJbcAjkrB0u4oqZoB%2BGM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"707715505851863","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"40"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215352956060C754C2C7EF43E7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_d
